title: Umami Tender Algerian Redcurrants Fritters
description: Crispy, sweetsavory fritters bursting with umami and tart redcurrants, perfect for a flavorful brunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cumin until combined.
Stir in soy sauce and lemon zest, then add milk and egg, mixing until just incorporated; the batter will be slightly lumpy.
Fold in the redcurrants gently, being careful not to crush them.
Heat olive oil in a deep skillet over medium heat until shimmering but not smoking.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, leaving space between each fritter.
Fry for 2–3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and puffed.
Remove fritters with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve warm, dusted with extra cumin or a sprinkle of dried oregano for extra aroma.
Optional: Drizzle with a light honey‑soy glaze or a squeeze of fresh lemon for brightness.
Keep leftovers refrigerated in an airtight container; reheat in a skillet or microwave until hot.
